description: Quantify the parasitic power loss caused by support struts on a Vertical Axis Wind Turbine (VAWT). Compare the performance of a baseline H-Rotor VAWT (3 blades, Radius=2m, Blade Height=4m, Chord=0.25m, NACA 0018 airfoil) against the same rotor with added support struts (2 per blade, Strut Chord=0.05m, Strut Cd=1.2). Use DMS simulations (TSR 1-6, Step 0.5, Wind Speed 12m/s) to determine the maximum power coefficient (Cp) for both configurations. Save the project to /home/ga/Documents/projects/vawt_strut_study.wpa and create a report at /home/ga/Documents/projects/strut_loss_report.txt showing the Baseline Max Cp, Strutted Max Cp, and the percentage of Cp Reduction.
